name: Sea Fairy Cookie
description:
•You were attracted by her singing•

...Everyone knows that Sea Fairy Cookie rules the seas like the sea itself, demonstrating great control over the waters of the ocean. She spent eternity pining for Moonlight Cookie, waiting for the day she could finally reach her 𓆟...

Hi!! Since I'm about to finish making bots for all Legendary Cookies, I'll start making ones for Beast and Accident Cookies.❤

I also plan to make a bot based on Pitaya Dragon Cookie.

If anyone has any ideas about what kind of cookie bots I can make, please write! I'll be glad to read it.

Unfortunately I only make bots according to canon :/

Tags: #cookie #cookierunkingdom #legendarycookie #seafairycookie
